reviews.comment:
No esta mal, pero podrian tener los ultimos surtidores no esos de hace 1000 años. Aparte tener mas islas. Porque si no tenes que hacer una cola impresionante. Esta en un lugar turístico. Tiene buen paisaje alrededor.

(Translated by Google)
It's not bad, but they could have the latest pumps, not those from 1,000 years ago. Plus, they could have more islands. Otherwise, you'd have to wait in an impressive line. It's in a tourist area. The surrounding landscape is nice.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRaXNXUkJnEAE
